title: VimFu — :g with :s — Substitute on Matches
description: Combine :g and :s to run substitution only on lines matching a different pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Global with S. Run a substitution only on lines that match a different pattern.
Replace old with new, but only on lines inside classes. Match lines with class first.
Actually, let's target the name lines that follow class definitions. Match lines containing name.
Old became new on the lines after class definitions. The helper function's name still says old. Global filtered, then S substituted.
Global with S. Two patterns working together. One to filter lines, one to transform them.
